audience_shift.from: We should show everything we built.
audience_shift.to: We should show the few things judges can score, trust, and retell.

throughline: A hackathon deck should start from the judging rubric, prove the hard part, and make the demo easy to score.

beats.transition: Start with the judging reality: time is short and proof must be easy to inspect.
Move from a feature list to the actual scoring lens.
Show how to prune a crowded source pile into a tight main deck.
Turn the story into a demonstrable path.
Explain where technical depth belongs and what it must prove.
Close with a practical review loop the team can reuse.
